I work in the field of oncology.
I am in charge of the oncology network.
My colleague works in the research team.
What do you do? Where are you based?
Hi! I dont think weve met. Im Sarah Bennett. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too, Sarah. Im Fernando. I work in the field of oncology.
Great! What do you do at the hospital?
Im a business manager. Im in charge of the oncology network.
Nice. Where are you based?
Our hospital is based in São Paulo. We have many partners in Latin America.
Wonderful. Im the strategic consultant for your network. Lets stay in touch.
Thank you, Sarah. Lets get in touch after the meeting.
Hi, I am Fernando. Nice to meet you.
Our hospital is based in São Paulo, Brazil.
It was great meeting you. Let us get in touch.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the Oncology Network meeting here at the hospital. My name is Sarah, and I am the strategic consultant for the project. We start at nine o'clock in the main room. Today we talk about our numbers, our plan, and our new partners in Latin America. Many colleagues and partners are here with us today. Please introduce yourself to new people and share your contact. If you need any help, I am at the front desk. Thank you, and have a great meeting.

Hi Fernando, this is Daniel from the research team. I call about the kick-off meeting for the new clinical research. The meeting is on Monday at two o'clock, and it is in English. Our American partners are on the call too. Please bring your notes about the budget and the contracts. It is a short meeting, about thirty minutes. Call me back when you are free. Thank you. Talk soon.
